attributes.action: More drilling of Oil and Gas in the North sea
attributes.additional_details: Support buiness and household reduce energy bills
attributes.background: To help house holds and buinesses reduce the price of energy.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make the most of our own natural resources. Allow companies to drill gas and oil
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065
